action.reasoning: Observation: Attention ResNet-LSTM reaches val exprate 0.0091 (test 0.0067) after 12 epochs; loss drops to ~1.24 but debug preds capture basic structure (sqrt/frac/sub) with many symbol errors. Analysis: seq_len~16 from heavy downsampling loses spatial detail critical for HMER alignment; aspect-distorting fixed resize hurts; more epochs/scheduler + capacity will help but root fix is better feature map (seq~64 via pad+resize). Decision: Rewrite complete model.py (add MathExprRecognizer, preprocess_image for aspect-preserving H=64 W=1024 pad, hidden=512, seq_len~64), full train.py (25 epochs, ReduceLROnPlateau on exprate, complete best/last save, updated Dataset), update predict/debug.py for new preprocess/hidden; run train+debug then submit_eval on best.pt for strong baseline + time check.
